nasb.text: Then Pharaoh sent for Moses and Aaron, and said to them, “I have sinned this time; the Lord is the righteous one, and I and my people are the wicked ones.

esv.text: Then Pharaoh sent and called Moses and Aaron and said to them, “This time I have sinned; the Lord is in the right, and I and my people are in the wrong.

cnv.text: 於是，法老把摩西和亞倫召了來，對他們說：“這一次我犯了罪了；耶和華是公義的，我和我的人民是有罪的。

ccb.text: 法老派人召来摩西和亚伦，对他们说：“这次我犯罪了，耶和华是对的，我和我的百姓错了。
